data.title: CORRECTING and REPLACING ATL Medical Integrates OMNIVISION’s OVMed® OH0131 Image Signal Processor into Its PREVOYANCE® Medical Imaging System
data.description: In Santa Clara, California, and Springville, Utah, it has been announced that ISO 13585 has been corrected to ISO 13485 in the second paragraph of a press release issued on March 31, 2026. The updated release reveals that ATL Medical has incorporated Omnivision's OVMED® OH0131 Image Signal Processor into its Prevoyance® Medical Imaging System. The OVMed® ISP OH0131 is equipped with sophisticated image algorithms to enhance brightness, contrast, saturation, hue, and sharpness, as well as advanced noise reduction technology.
Senior White House Official: Trump's national Security team is gathered at the White House - ABC News

data.title: BEASLEY BROADCAST GROUP TO REPORT FY 2025 FINANCIAL RESULTS, HOST CONFERENCE CALL AND WEBCAST ON APRIL 8
data.description: In Naples, Florida, on April 3, 2026, Beasley Broadcast Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: BBGI), a prominent multi-platform media firm, revealed plans to release its financial results for the fiscal year 2025 on Wednesday, April 8, 2026, before the market opens.

data.title: ORIC Pharmaceuticals Reports Inducement Grants under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: In South San Francisco and San Diego, on April 3, 2026, ORIC Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: ORIC), a company concentrating on oncology treatments targeting therapeutic resistance mechanisms, revealed that on April 1, 2026, they provided a new non-executive employee, who joined in March 2026, with 80,000 non-qualified stock options and 15,000 restricted stock units.

data.title: AIOS Tech Inc. Announces Receipt of Nasdaq Notification Regarding Minimum Bid Price Deficiency
data.description: On April 1, 2026, AIOS Tech Inc. (NASDAQ: AIOS) disclosed that it had received correspondence from Nasdaq indicating that the company had failed to meet the sustained listing criteria under Nasdaq Listing Rules 5550(a)(2). This was due to the closing bid price of AIOS's Class A Common Shares falling below $1 per share over the past 30 consecutive business days. This notification implied that AIOS was not meeting the minimum bid price stipulated by Nasdaq for continued listing.

data.title: Midland States Bancorp, Inc. To Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results On Thursday, April 23
data.description: In Effingham, Illinois, on April 3, 2026, Midland States Bancorp, Inc. (Nasdaq: MSBI) revealed plans to release its first quarter 2026 financial data on April 23, 2026, after the market closes. The announcement will include an investor presentation accessible on the Webcasts and Presentations page of the company's investor relations website.

data.title: Xilio Therapeutics Announces Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: In WALTHAM, Massachusetts, on April 03, 2026, Xilio Therapeutics, Inc. revealed that it granted non-qualified stock options to two new employees on April 1, 2026. The options enable the purchase of 3,257 shares of the company's common stock under Xilio Therapeutics’ 2022 Inducement Stock Incentive Plan. Xilio Therapeutics is a clinical-stage biotechnology firm focusing on developing masked immuno-oncology therapies for individuals battling cancer. The company trades on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol XLO.

data.title: Shift4 Announces Fourth Dividend Date for Mandatory Convertible Preferred Stock
data.description: In Center Valley, Pennsylvania, Shift4 Payments, Inc. (NYSE: FOUR) revealed that following the issuance of 10,000,000 shares of 6% Series A Mandatory Convertible Preferred Stock on May 5, 2025, the Board of Directors has approved a dividend of $1.50 per share. This dividend is set to be distributed in cash on May 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 15, 2026. The announcement aligns with the terms outlined in the offering for the Mandatory Convertible Preferred Stock.

data.title: Polpo Restaurant & Saloon Announces Highly Anticipated Return to Palm Beach with New Location Coming Soon
data.description: Polpo Restaurant & Saloon, a renowned fine dining establishment based in Greenwich, Connecticut, has revealed its exciting comeback to Palm Beach, Florida. After operating a prosperous location in the past, the brand is now gearing up to make a grand reentry into the area. The announcement was made on April 3, 2026.

data.title: Mobilfy Worldwide Appoints Luke LaPresta as VP of Sales and Partner Acquisitions
data.description: In Brooklyn, New York, as of April 3, 2026, Mobilfy Worldwide revealed that Luke LaPresta is set to become the Vice President of Sales and Partner Acquisitions, starting on April 6th, 2026. In his new position, Luke will be responsible for overseeing Mobilfy's sales strategy across the country and acquiring partners.
US bank deposits rose to $18.987 tln from $18.895 tln in the prior week.

data.title: Educational Vistas and The Core Collaborative Announce Strategic Partnership to Turn Data into Instructional Impact
data.description: Schenectady, New York, on April 3, 2026 - An educational partnership between Educational Vistas and The Core Collaborative has been revealed, with the aim of guiding educators in transitioning from analytics to practical measures. This collaboration will integrate the capabilities of the DataMate™ assessment platform with impactful professional resources.

data.title: Nuclear Energy Stock Touts Key Milestone In Reactor Race
data.description: Nano Nuclear Energy has requested authorization to commence the construction of its small modular reactor. The company's milestone in the reactor race was highlighted in a recent article on Investor's Business Daily. The reactor has garnered attention for its innovative design and capabilities, with significant interest from investors. This development marks a crucial step forward for Nano Nuclear Energy as it seeks to revolutionize the nuclear energy industry.

data.title: Arhaus Expands in Northern Virginia with New Ashburn Showroom
data.description: A new showroom is set to open at One Loudoun in Northern Virginia for the artisan-crafted furnishings brand, further solidifying its presence in the region. This move comes as part of the brand's expansion strategy in the area, with the showroom aiming to showcase its wide range of products to both residents and visitors. The opening of this new location highlights the brand's commitment to providing quality and unique furnishings to its customers. The showroom is expected to feature a diverse selection of pieces, ranging from furniture to decor items, catering to various tastes and preferences. This expansion marks a significant milestone for the brand as it continues to grow its footprint in Northern Virginia.

data.title: Spyre Therapeutics Announces Grants of Inducement Awards
data.description: In Waltham, Massachusetts, on April 3, 2026, Spyre Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: SYRE) disclosed that the independent Compensation Committee of the Board of Directors sanctioned the allocation of stock options for the purchase of a total of 70,200 common stock shares of Spyre. These options were granted to five non-executive employees as equity inducement awards under the Spyre Therapeutics, Inc. 2018 Equity Inducement Plan, recently amended. The approval for these stock options was granted on April 1, 2026. The award was significant for each employee as it played a key role in their decision to join Spyre, meeting the criteria set by Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: Syndax Pharmaceuticals Reports Inducement Grants Under NASDAQ Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: On April 1, 2026, Syndax Pharmaceuticals, a biopharmaceutical company listed on Nasdaq with the symbol SNDX, disclosed the granting of inducement awards to eight new employees as part of the 2023 Inducement Plan. These awards allow the purchase of up to 228,500 shares of common stock. The stock options will vest over a span of four years, with the initial 25% becoming available on the first anniversary of the vesting start date. Subsequently, 1/48th of the shares will vest monthly over the following 36 months, contingent upon the employees' continuous service with Syndax up to the respective vesting dates.

data.title: Gracianna Winery & Rick Bartalini Presents Continue the Gracianna Concert Series in Hawaiʻi with Earth, Wind & Fire
data.description: In a harmonious blend of gratitude and music, Healdsburg, California, and Honolulu are set to host a memorable event on April 3, 2026. Following the overwhelming success of the first Gracianna Concert Series, Gracianna Winery and Rick Bartalini Presents have joined forces to present the iconic music group Earth, Wind & Fire. The inaugural event sold out, showcasing the high demand for this unique musical experience. Join us in celebrating legendary music with numbers indicating significant public interest in this exceptional gathering.

data.title: OFN Statement on the Fiscal Year 2027 President's Budget Request
data.description: OFN is calling for ongoing bipartisan backing of the CDFI Fund, crucial for advancing American economic and affordability goals. The statement was made in response to the White House's Fiscal Year (FY) 2027. The CDFI Fund is essential in supporting community development and has delivered impactful results. It has enabled economic empowerment and access to affordable resources across the nation. Continued investment and support are imperative for sustaining these efforts.

data.title: AEON Biopharma notified about noncompliance with NYSE American listing standards, faces possible delisting.
data.description: A recent report indicates that there has been a significant increase in the number of COVID-19 cases in the United States. As of the latest data, over 3.5 million confirmed cases have been reported nationwide. The spike in cases has led to a surge in hospitalizations, with more than 60,000 people currently being treated for COVID-19 in medical facilities. Unfortunately, the death toll has also risen, surpassing 140,000 fatalities across the country. Health officials are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing to help curb the spread of the virus.

data.title: Ortho Sport & Spine Physicians Expands to 63 Locations Across 18 States, Strengthening National Orthopedic Care Network
data.description: In a recent development, Ortho Sport & Spine Physicians (OSSP), a privately owned spine and orthopedic practice, has significantly increased its presence nationwide. The expansion has led to OSSP now operating in 63 locations spread across 18 states. This strategic growth has solidified OSSP's position as one of the leading independently owned orthopedic networks in the United States.
